name: Roasted Eggplant & Vegetable Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 450°F.
2. Char the eggplant over a moderate gas flame, turning it frequently, until all the skin is blackened.
3. Transfer the eggplant to a baking dish and bake until soft, about 15 to 20 minutes. Cool slightly and scrape off most of the charred skin.
4. Coarsely chop the cooled eggplant.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over moderate heat. Add ginger, jalapeno, and cumin seeds, and fry for 30 seconds.
6. Stir in the chopped bell peppers and sauté until softened (about 6 to 8 minutes).
7. Add the zucchini and tomatoes, then cook for 2 more minutes before cooling slightly.
8. Pulse the eggplant mixture briefly in a food processor to puree coarsely.
9. Add the pepper mixture and process until the vegetables are finely chopped.
10. Add lime juice and season with salt and pepper.
11. Pack the pate into a crock and spray with olive oil.
12. At serving time, garnish with cilantro.
13. Cover and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
